allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_excel\('mock_data.xlsx'\); print\('columns:', list\(df.columns\)\); print\('rows:', len\(df\)\); print\('unique sensors:', df['sensor_id'].nunique\(\)\); print\('lng range:', df['lng'].min\(\), '-', df['lng'].max\(\)\); print\('lat range:', df['lat'].min\(\), '-', df['lat'].max\(\)\); print\('per-sensor unique coords:', df.groupby\('sensor_id'\)[['lng','lat']].nunique\(\).max\(\).to_dict\(\)\)")
